name: OverCore - Rain World OC

"Dont make bots too fast, otherwise you will run out of ideas and your friends out of cuh 🥀🥀🥀"

Probably 1 or 2 days. Idk.

Cya.

Also, an art of fizaroh based on that expi thumbnail. (But with very diferent context)
